title: Routines
subtitle: Recurring work definitions that materialize into auditable execution issues.
selectCompany: Select a company to view routines.
noRoutinesYet: No routines yet. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.
newRoutineHint: Define the recurring work first. Trigger setup comes next on the detail page.
advancedDeliveryHint: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.

concurrencyPolicy.coalesceIfActive: If a run is already active, keep just one follow-up run queued.
concurrencyPolicy.alwaysEnqueue: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if the routine is already running.
concurrencyPolicy.skipIfActive: Drop new trigger occurrences while a run is still active.

catchUpPolicy.skipMissed: Ignore windows that were missed while the scheduler or routine was paused.
catchUpPolicy.enqueueMissedWithCap: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.

afterCreationHint: After creation, Paperclip takes you straight to trigger setup for schedules, webhooks, or internal runs.

toast.routineCreatedBody: Add the first trigger to turn it into a live workflow.
toast.failedToUpdateBody: Paperclip could not update the routine.
toast.runFailedBody: Paperclip could not start the routine run.
